title: desmodium cinereum
intro: Desmodium cinereum, also known as grayleaf tickclover, is a perennial herbaceous plant native to eastern North America. It has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiseptic properties. The plant is believed to provide various health benefits, such as relieving fever, reducing pain and swelling, and treating wounds. Desmodium cinereum is often prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and is sometimes used topically to promote healing and soothe skin irritations.
